headline: PayPal Expands PYUSD Globally As Board Shift Frames Valuation Question
summary: PayPal Holdings (NasdaqGS:PYPL) is rolling out its U.S. dollar-backed stablecoin, PayPal USD (PYUSD), to users in more than 70 countries. The company is extending PYUSD beyond the U.S. to support faster, lower-cost cross-border transfers for consumers and businesses. PayPal has also appointed Alyssa Henry, former CEO of Block’s Square business and former Amazon Web Services executive, to its Board of Directors. For anyone watching digital payments, these moves highlight where PayPal is...

headline: Cathie Wood Chooses Medical AI Over Mark Zuckerberg: Ark Loads Up On TEM Stock, Dumps Meta Shares
summary: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest bought Tempus AI shares while trimming Meta, signaling a shift toward medical AI over big tech exposure.

headline: AI will not lead to mass permanent unemployment
summary: History demonstrates time and time again that technological leaps have ultimately proved to be net job creators.

headline: Only 22% of global workers believe their jobs are safe, ADP finds
summary: Investing.com -- Only 22% of global workers strongly believe their jobs are safe from elimination, according to a new report from ADP Research released Wednesday, revealing widespread anxiety despite historically low unemployment rates worldwide.

raw.headline: Only 22% of global workers believe their jobs are safe, ADP finds

headline: Alyssa Henry to Join PayPal's Board of Directors; Gail J. McGovern to Retire from Board
summary: PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PYPL) today announced that Alyssa Henry, former CEO of Block's Square business, has joined the company's Board of Directors. The company also announced that Gail J. McGovern, who has served on the Board since 2015, will not stand for re-election at PayPal's upcoming Annual Meeting of Stockholders in May.

headline: 'Most People Don't Enjoy Their Jobs:' Perplexity CEO Says AI Layoffs Are Chance To Launch AI-Powered Ventures
summary: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas calls AI layoffs an opportunity, urging workers to embrace entrepreneurship and reinvent careers amid job displacement.
